import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../../contexts/AuthContext'; import { useNotifications } from '../../contexts/NotificationContext'; import { LoadingSpinner } from '../../components/LoadingSpinner'; import LoadingSkeleton from '../../components/LoadingSkeleton'; import { Users, Briefcase, FileText, Calendar, Bell, MessageSquare, TrendingUp, Clock, Award, BookOpen, Plus, Shield, BarChart3, Settings, UserCheck, AlertTriangle } from 'lucide-react'; const AdminDashboard = () => { const { user, api } = useAuth(); const { notifications, unreadCount } = useNotifications(); const [stats, setStats] = useState({ totalUsers: 0, totalStudents: 0, totalAlumni: 0, totalAdmins: 0, totalJobs: 0, totalMOUs: 0, totalEvents: 0, totalNotices: 0, recentUsers: 0, activeSessions: 0, pendingApplications: 0, activeStudents: 0, activeAlumni: 0 }); const [recentActivities, setRecentActivities] = useState([]); const [systemHealth, setSystemHealth] = useState({ status: 'healthy', uptime: '99.9%', responseTime: '120ms' }); const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true); const [error, setError] = useState(null); useEffect(() => { fetchDashboardData(); }, []); const fetchDashboardData = async () => { try { setIsLoading(true); setError(null); // Fetch comprehensive stats const [usersRes, jobsRes, mouRes, eventsRes, noticesRes, messagesRes] = await Promise.all([ api.get('/users/stats'), api.get('/jobs?limit=1'), api.get('/mou/stats'), api.get('/events?limit=1'), api.get('/notices/stats'), api.get('/messages?type=received&limit=1') ]); // Process user stats with new fields const userStats = usersRes.data; const totalUsers = userStats.totalUsers || 0; const recentUsers = userStats.recentUsers || 0; const activeSessions = userStats.activeSessions || 0; // Role distribution from roleStats array const roleStats = userStats.roleStats || []; const studentsCount = roleStats.find(r => r._id === 'student')?.count || 0; const alumniCount = roleStats.find(r => r._id === 'alumni')?.count || 0; const adminsCount = roleStats.find(r => r._id === 'admin')?.count || 0; // Pending applications const jobsResponse = await api.get('/jobs?limit=100'); const pendingApplications = jobsResponse.data.jobs.reduce( (sum, job) => sum + (job.applications?.filter(app => app.status === 'pending') || []).length, 0 ); setStats({ totalUsers, totalStudents: studentsCount, totalAlumni: alumniCount, totalAdmins: adminsCount, totalJobs: jobsRes.data.pagination?.total || 0, totalMOUs: mouRes.data.totalMOUs || 0, totalEvents: eventsRes.data.pagination?.total || 0, totalNotices: noticesRes.data.totalNotices || 0, recentUsers, activeSessions, pendingApplications }); // Set recent activities from notifications setRecentActivities(notifications.slice(0, 5)); } catch (error) { console.error('Failed to fetch dashboard data:', error); // Set default values on error setSystemHealth({ status: 'error', uptime: 'Unknown', responseTime: 'Unknown' }); } finally { setIsLoading(false); } }; if (isLoading) { return (
{[...Array(3)].map((_, i) => ( ))}
{[...Array(4)].map((_, i) => ( ))}
); } if (error) { return (

Failed to load dashboard

Stats could not be fetched. Please refresh.

); } return (
{/* Welcome Header */}

Welcome back, {user?.name}!

System administration dashboard - Manage your alumni network • {stats.activeSessions || 0} active sessions

{/* System Health */}

System Status

{systemHealth.status === 'healthy' ? 'All Systems Operational' : systemHealth.status === 'warning' ? 'Minor Issues' : 'System Issues'}

New Users (30 days)

{stats.recentUsers}

Pending Applications

{stats.pendingApplications}

{/* Main Stats Grid */}

Total Users

{stats.totalUsers}

Total Jobs

{stats.totalJobs}

MOUs

{stats.totalMOUs}

Events

{stats.totalEvents}

{/* User Distribution */}

User Distribution

Students
{stats.totalStudents}
Alumni
{stats.totalAlumni}

{stats.totalAdmins}
{/* Quick Actions */}

Admin Actions

Manage Users Manage Jobs Manage MOUs Manage Events Manage Notices Analytics
{/* Recent Activities */}

Recent System Activities

View all
{recentActivities.length > 0 ? ( recentActivities.map((notification) => (
{ notification.type === 'job' ? : notification.type === 'event' ? : notification.type === 'notice' ? : }

{notification.title}

{notification.message}

{new Date(notification.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}

{!notification.isRead && (
)}
)) ) : (

No recent activities

)}
); }; export default AdminDashboard;
